steps.title: Give a nickname example
steps.content: The goal is to provide an example of a dinosaur fossil specimen's nickname. The answer must name the nickname and connect it to a specific fossil specimen.

steps.title: Reject general descriptions
steps.content: Choice A says a specimen has a nickname but does not provide it. Choice B only says many specimens have nicknames. Choice D describes the Brachylophosaurus specimen and its period without naming the nickname. The remaining choice identifies Roberta as the nickname. The answer is C.
